error_signature: previous upload component variables were used
title: Incorrect variables used in form upload component
symptom: The file display issue occurs because the previous upload component's variables are still being referenced, leading to unexpected behavior.
applies_when: Using a new form upload component
Previous component variables are still linked
not_this_if: All variables have been updated to match the new component
root_cause: When switching to a new form upload component, if the variables from the old component are not updated, it can cause conflicts or errors in file display and processing.
fix_steps: Open the new form upload component settings
Update the variables to match the new component
agent_instruction: Ensure that the variables in the new form upload component are correctly updated and saved.
